Her Story 02 / 04
[ video embed ]

Meet
Echo.

Echo is a musician living in the "poverty apartments" of Notting. She plays everything. Drums, bass, guitar, keys. Talent isn't the problem. Rent is.

Turns out guitars and rent cost money. So Echo's picked up a… unique side hustle.

Now she moves through the city on rollerblades, leaving spray-painted tags and the occasional empty bank vault behind her. Somewhere between a punk show and a crime scene, Echo is trying to make it big. Or at least make rent.

"Everyone has a side hustle,
mine's just
more fun."

Echo · Character Profile · Breaking In OST · 2025
Blind Box Collectible Series · 4 Variants

02 / 04 The Blind Box

The
Blind
Box

Each Echo Was Here Blind Box contains one mystery figure from the collection. You won't know which version of Echo you'll get until you open it.

Every box is sealed and part of a limited production run by Playing in Puddles.

Each box also includes an exclusive collectible character card — one per box.

Purchasing

Blind Boxes are released in small drops. When a drop goes live, boxes will be available for purchase directly through this site.

Because quantities are limited, drops may sell out quickly.

Limit: 3 boxes per person per drop.
Join the Waitlist

Want to know when the next drop happens? Join the waitlist to get notified when new Blind Boxes are released and when Echo leaves her next mark.

The Object

Music you
can play
with.

Each blind box comes with one of four Echo figurines. Drop it onto the speaker's slot and hear her instrument — drums, bass, guitar, or vocals — rise out of Breaking In in isolation. Collect all four. Hear the whole song build up.
